chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1241 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objections. 2. For orders on CMA No.5486/25. (Ex/A) 3. For orders on CMA No. 5487/25 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case. 29.10.2025 Mr. Gulshan Ahmed Shujrah, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- AAG submits that for the appointment on the disable quota, DRC was called and their interview was also held, but the present petitioners were remained absent. Under the circumstances, instant petition is disposed of with directions to the Deputy Commissioner, Ghotki, to consider the case of petitioners in next coming DRC and decide the case of petitioner in accordance with law, if law prevails. Accordingly instant petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
